title: Israel shifts to 'defensive posture' ahead of June 22 fifth round — 'offensive operations in the south will stop'; pilot zone LAF village program begins
snippet: Israeli official: 'a ceasefire means an end to offensive operations. We will stop conducting offensive activity and move to a defensive posture.' Offensive operations in south Lebanon will stop. Pilot zone program: LAF completes dismantlement in a village, remains to demonstrate control, expand to additional villages if successful. Fifth round of Israel-Lebanon talks scheduled June 22. 'Until then, there is still time to save the ceasefire.'
tag_reason: New Israeli policy shift — defensive posture announcement first reported
